rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f0 != -3, f0 > 100, $b0_0_0 : f1)
    T1($b0_1_0 : f0)
    accumulate( T1($s0_2 : f1); $a0_2 : max($s0_2) )
then
    delete($p0_0);
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f0 <= -5)
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p1_0.isF2(), $p1_0.getF0(), $p1_0.getF0(), $p1_0.isF1()));
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T0($b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f2)
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p2_0.isF1(), $p2_0.getF0(), $p2_0.getF0(), true));
    insert(new T1(true, 6, $p2_0.getF0(), $b2_0_0));
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T1(f2 != 11, f1 < 4, $b3_0_0 : f1)
then
    delete($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
when
    (or $p4_0 : T0(f0 < 100) $p4_0 : T0(f0 != 0.0))
then
    insert(new T1(false, $p4_0.getF0(), 100, $p4_0.isF2()));
    insert(new T1($p4_0.isF1(), $p4_0.getF0(), 12, $p4_0.isF2()));
end
rule "R5"
when
    $p5_0 : T0($b5_0_0 : f1, $b5_0_1 : f2, f2 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T1(false, $p5_0.getF0(), 100, true));
    insertLogical(new T1($b5_0_1, $p5_0.getF0(), $p5_0.getF0(), true));
    $p5_0.setF2(true);
    update($p5_0);
end
